document: The city council approved a new park on Tuesday. The park will include playgrounds and walking trails. Construction begins next spring.
summary: City council approved a new park with playgrounds and trails.

document: Researchers published a study on sleep. They found that adults who slept seven hours performed better on memory tests. The study followed 500 participants.
summary: Study finds seven hours of sleep improves memory in adults.

document: A local bakery won a national award. The owner credited her grandmother's recipes. The shop has operated for twenty years.
summary: Local bakery wins national award using family recipes.

document: The transit agency added three new bus routes. The routes connect suburbs to downtown. Officials expect reduced traffic congestion.
summary: Transit agency adds three bus routes to ease congestion.
